fields.name: Game Engine Settings
fields.definition: This contains the definitions for the built-in custom multiplayer game variants

fields.name: Appearance Traits
fields.definition: Traits that affect the player's appearance

fields.name: Motion Sensor Traits
fields.definition: Traits that affect the HUD motion sensor behavior

fields.name: woman bound for glory, why you leaving me again?
gonna pack her bags and leave this house of pain
carrying points#points per second when carrying the ball
ball kill points#number of points for a melee kill with the ball
carrier kill points#number of points for killing the ball carrier
ball spawn delay:seconds#time until first ball spawn after round start, and also delay in respawning ball if it goes out of play
ball inactive respawn:seconds#time until ball respawns if it is inactive
safe haven movement time#0 is no movement
weapon upgrade seconds#seconds after which the player (or shared tier), is upgraded to the next tier. -1 for never
one kill in a row player traits name
two kills in a row player traits name
three kills in a row player traits name
four kills in a row player traits name
five kills in a row player traits name
secondary weapon^#this is the dual-wielded secondary weapon. only valid if both weapons are dual-wieldable

options: moving friendly bipeds moving neutral vehicles
allow tier skipping#allows the player to earn more than points per weapon from a single kill
disable tier syncing#players will only sync to the current tier upon spawn
both ways#downgrades the dead player and upgrades the killing player
none#no points are awarded to either player
